title: onobrychis carduchorum
intro: Onobrychis carduchorum, also known as Kurdish clover, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis carduchorum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
